meaning: vt.铺在...下面,垫起vi.向下延伸n.衬垫物
examples: As an additional safeguard against weeds you can always use an underlay of heavy duty polyethylene.
Press the seam open and carefully align the underlay before pinning the right sides together.
Objective To explore Hydrogels underlay in preventing bed sore of orthopaedic surgery patient.
Ideally, an underlay of ground-based interceptors would also be deployed in a layered SDI system.
This fantasizing, in its childish way was thumos, the desire for recognition and union, which underlay the other drives for money and success.
